user: What was the ROI of TikTok campaigns?
sql: SELECT (SUM(actual) - SUM(budget)) / SUM(budget) FROM marketing_budget WHERE channel='TikTok'
answer: The ROI for TikTok campaigns was 15%.

user: Show me the budget variance by brand.
sql: SELECT brand, SUM(budget - actual) FROM marketing_budget GROUP BY brand
answer: Brand X has the highest positive variance...
